titleStmt.title: SII 31.28: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 28. (A.R. No. B 294 of 1937.) BHAṬṬIPRŌLU, REPALLE TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the fourth pillar inside the kalyāṇa maṇḍapa of Viṭṭhalēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1174, Parīdhāvi, Chaitra, Vishu corresponding to March 12, 1252 A.D.

Registers the gift of land as pannasa by Paripūrṇaśiva mahamuni son of Viśvēśvaraśivamahāmuni, the guru of the king Kākatīya Gaṇapatidēva to Pōtasāni, daughter of Maḷḷēni Kāminēni for the service rendered in the temple of Peddaviddēśvara of Bhaṭṭiprōlu. The gift is entrusted to Peggaḍa Apparāju for maintaining the worship. The writer of the record is Amarīśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1174 nēṁṭi paridhāvi saṁva
tsara caitra viṣupu medalu
gānu śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśva
ra kākatiyya gaṇapatidēva
mahārājula gurulu vi

śvēśvara śivamahāmunulu vā
riki koḍku paripū¨rṇna śivamahā
munulu tamataṁḍriviśvē
śvara śiva mahāmunulaku
dha¨rmma pugānu mallēni kā
minēni kūṁttuṟu pōtasā

niki śrīmadbhaṭṭīprōlipedda
viddēśvara dēvara pōlamu
lōna kha 3 cēnu passagānu ni
ccitimi Ācaṁdrā¨rka sdhāya
gānu biḍḍabiḍḍa taramu
dēvaraṁ golici sukhamanu

bhaviṁpaṁgala vāṟu .
ḍe pe¨rgga Apparājuko
lucuduru . Amarīśvara
vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 31.28 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
